arts.ttl: Man United v Tottenham: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Man United v Tottenham: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Marcus Rashford slammed as Twente star delivers brutally honest verdict
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a disappointing start to the season and Red Devils boss Erik ten Hag will be hoping to kickstart the campaign with a win over Tottenham on Sunday

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag agrees with Steve McClaren over Man Utd's main problem this season
arts.sum: Manchester United go into their game against Tottenham on Sunday after two dreadful matches in front of goal - and their manager and former coach are clear what needs to improve

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou gives verdict on Erik ten Hag theory ahead of Man Utd showdown
arts.sum: Tottenham head coach Ange Postecoglou has insisted that trophies alone do not prove a manager is doing a good job - despite the fact that Erik ten Hag has suggested different

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou offers support to 'under pressure' Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Both Postecoglou and Ten Hag find themselves facing significant scrutiny after underwhelming starts to the new season - tenth-placed Spurs sit ahead of United only on goal difference - and defeat on Sunday would undoubtedly ramp up the pressure on whoever comes out on the losing end. Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou has offered his support to under-fire Manchester United counterpart Erik ten Hag as the pair prepare to do battle on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou keen to see Son shine at Spurs for as long as possible
arts.sum: The South Korean has played every minute for Tottenham in the Premier League this season.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag says Man United must ‘respect the criticism’ ahead of Spurs clash
arts.sum: Ten Hag was annoyed by United’s mentality and toothlessness in their Europa League opener against FC Twente.

arts.ttl: Sam Allardyce risks Erik ten Hag's wrath with "behind the scenes" Man Utd theory
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford was surprisingly left on the bench for Manchester United’s Premier League clash with Crystal Palace and a number of comments have been made about his place under Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou insists he wants to 'ease' Son Heung-min's workload after playing him more than he wanted to this season... with the Tottenham star a DOUBT for their clash with Man United
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Son has been ever present this season, starting in all except the Carabao Cup tie at Coventry when he came on for the last half hour with the result in the balance.

arts.ttl: Ornstein reveals Man Utd's transfer plans for 2025
arts.sum: Manchester United are determined to add to their offensive ranks in upcoming transfer windows, according to David Ornstein. However, after signing Manuel Ugarte late in the window, Man Utd were not in a position to bolster their attack.
